title: Lead Frontend Developer at Accenture India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Accenture India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Accenture India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Accenture India Global Group:
Accenture India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India Global Group!
